grounds.author: Reviewing Attorney
grounds.basis: no-fault divorce on irreconcilable marital differences, 19-A M.R.S. § 902(1)(I)

jurisdiction_basis.author: Reviewing Attorney
jurisdiction_basis.basis: Plaintiff has resided in Maine in good faith for more than six months, 19-A M.R.S. § 901(1)(A)

children_recital: Riley E. Noe, born March 3, 2016, and Jane T. Noe, born July 12, 2019
property_recital: The marital estate includes the parties' residence, household goods and furnishings, two motor vehicles, and retirement accounts; the parties have also incurred marital debts.
